'''zachaha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:obbligato|obbligato]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-ch-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:obbligato|obbligato]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zachaha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zæchæhæth|zæchæhæth]] || [[word:zæchæhæj|zæchæhæj]] || [[word:zæchæhæsh|zæchæhæsh]] || [[word:zæchæhæ|zæchæhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zachachahath|zachachahath]] || [[word:zachachahaj|zachachahaj]] || [[word:zachachahash|zachachahash]] || [[word:zachachaha|zachachaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zachahath|zachahath]] || [[word:zachahaj|zachahaj]] || [[word:zachahash|zachahash]] || [[word:zachaha|zachaha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zachafhath|zachafhath]] || [[word:zachafhaj|zachafhaj]] || [[word:zachafhash|zachafhash]] || [[word:zachafhaf|zachafhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zachahatha|zachahatha]] || [[word:zachahaja|zachahaja]] || [[word:zachahasha|zachahasha]] || [[word:zachahaka|zachahaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zachahath|zachahath]] || [[word:zachahaj|zachahaj]] || [[word:zachahash|zachahash]] || [[word:zachaha|zachaha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zachahathal|zachahathal]] || [[word:zachahajal|zachahajal]] || [[word:zachahashal|zachahashal]] || [[word:zachahakal|zachahakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zachahathatha|zachahathatha]] || [[word:zachahajaja|zachahajaja]] || [[word:zachahashasha|zachahashasha]] || [[word:zachahaka|zachahaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zachahathan|zachahathan]] || [[word:zachahajan|zachahajan]] || [[word:zachahashan|zachahashan]] || [[word:zachahakan|zachahakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zachahathaoro|zachahathaoro]] || [[word:zachahajaoro|zachahajaoro]] || [[word:zachahashaoro|zachahashaoro]] || [[word:zachahakaoro|zachahakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a6f1c69}}
